owner.evidence: Exact-hash owner/model review verified the 1e-12 bootstrap tolerance, platform-stable rounded diagnostics, no false near-zero secure-improvement claim, unchanged forecasts/watchlists, BLOCKED promotion, null recommendations, ABSTAIN comparisons, and zero stakes.

replication_1.evidence: Three isolated clean-room builds were byte-identical and matched the reviewed prediction and metrics hashes; 32 fixtures reproduce as 14 elapsed, 12 current, and six conditional, with rounded bootstrap diagnostics and zero recommendations/stakes.

replication_2.evidence: Data/statistics review verified the 1e-12 tolerance is conservative, rounded confidence intervals preserve interpretation, the effectively-zero Over 2.5 interval does not claim secure improvement, and all comparisons remain ABSTAIN with unvalidated profitability and zero stakes.

editor.evidence: Editor/UI review verified accurate challenger wording (worse NLL/BTTS, effective Over 2.5 tie, no secure improvement), 12 bilingual six-step current watchlists, six conditional STOP-only cards, 14 archive-only cards, null recommendations, and permanent zero-stake safeguards.
